events.title: Maharashtra Samaj Sammelan
events.description: Annual gathering of Bhavsar Kshatriya families across Maharashtra for cultural programs, networking, and community welfare discussions.

events.title: Gujarat Youth Empowerment Drive
events.description: Skill development workshop and scholarship guidance session for young members of the Bhavsar community in Gujarat.

events.title: Karnataka Tulja Bhavani Puja
events.description: Community puja and prasad distribution organized by the Bangalore Bhavsar Samaj chapter.
